params-schema.description: Declarative field mapping. The output is built by starting from `target_template` and then applying each mapping — moving or copying a value from a source dotted-path to a target dotted-path, optionally coercing its type and passing it through a simple function.

target_template.description: Starting shape of the output (may be empty). Keys omitted here are created as needed when a mapping writes into them.

source.description: dotted path in input — supports [N] for list index, [] to append

target.description: dotted path in output — same syntax

default.description: used when source path is absent/null

passthrough_extras.description: If true, every source leaf not referenced by any mapping is copied into the `extras` key of the output (preserving dotted-path name).

target_bblock.description: Optional: id of the target bblock whose schema should be used for validation instead of the transformer's own canonical.schema.json.
